stemHtml: Regarding autopilot and flight director (FD) systems. Can they be used simultaneously?

options.a: No, it is not possible to use the flight director and autopilot at the same time.
options.b: No, because the flight director disconnects automatically when the autopilot is engaged.
options.c: Yes, the flight director displays the guidance commands that the autopilot is following.
options.d: Yes, the FD can only be used with the autopilot engaged.
